Timer service implementation and management functions for FreeRTOS, including creation, execution, and deletion.


## Files
- **[new_timer.c](new_timer.c.md)**: Implements a timer service with functions to create, start, stop, and manage timers in a FreeRTOS environment.
- **[new_timer.h](new_timer.h.md)**: High-priority thread for executing timers and work, with functions for creating, starting, stopping, and deleting timers.
- **[new_timer_service.h](new_timer_service.h.md)**: Initializes the new timer service.
